scope: Independent verification that MVP-012 fixed the MVP-011 blocking plan-example validation failure without weakening the protocol contract or adding downstream implementation code.
verdict: MVP-012 passes independent verification. The exact MVP plan request, ok response, and error response examples now include protocol_version: 1 and a valid UUID request_id, validate against generated JSON Schemas, deserialize through the public AutocompleteRequest/AutocompleteResponse types, and pass semantic Validate. The protocol_version contract remains required in the Rust public types and semantic validator. No server, provider implementation, VS Code client, or Obsidian client code was introduced by this slice.

commands_run.command: git status --short && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test
commands_run.result: passed for cargo fmt --all --check and cargo test; cargo test passed all protocol tests (8 integration tests plus crate/doc harnesses). git status showed pre-existing unrelated deleted legacy orchestration files and untracked orchestration/worker files before this handoff was written.
passed; output reported schema_valid=true, deserialize=ok, semantic_valid=true for protocol.autocomplete_request_example, protocol.autocomplete_response_example, and protocol.error_response_example.

passed; plan examples contain protocol_version: 1 and UUID request_id values; public types keep protocol_version as a non-optional field; semantic validation rejects unsupported protocol versions; regression test loads exact plan examples and validates generated schema, public deserialization, and Validate.

commands_run.command: find/grep inspection for downstream implementation boundaries
commands_run.result: passed; Cargo workspace contains only crates/autocomplete-protocol; clients/ and packages/ directories are absent; grep found protocol data-model/provider-health/error-code references only, not server/provider/client implementation code.

goals_checked.goal: Run cargo fmt --all --check and cargo test.
evidence: cargo fmt --all --check completed successfully as part of the combined command.
cargo test completed successfully: endpoint_response_types, plan_examples, request_fixture, response_fixtures, schema_export, and validation integration tests all passed.

goals_checked.goal: Verify the exact plan examples deserialize through public AutocompleteRequest/AutocompleteResponse types, validate against generated schemas, and pass semantic Validate.
evidence: reports/autocomplete-engine-mvp-plan-2026-05-28.json:117-118 request example includes protocol_version: 1 and request_id 018f160e-7152-7b43-9d9a-6083e0bd3cc8.
reports/autocomplete-engine-mvp-plan-2026-05-28.json:146-147 ok response example includes protocol_version: 1 and the same valid UUID request_id.
reports/autocomplete-engine-mvp-plan-2026-05-28.json:159-160 error response example includes protocol_version: 1 and the same valid UUID request_id.

crates/autocomplete-protocol/tests/plan_examples.rs loads protocol.autocomplete_request_example, protocol.autocomplete_response_example, and protocol.error_response_example directly from the MVP plan JSON.

The plan_examples test validates the request against schema::autocomplete_request_schema(), validates both responses against schema::autocomplete_response_schema(), deserializes via public AutocompleteRequest/AutocompleteResponse, and calls Validate::validate().
cargo test -p autocomplete-protocol --test plan_examples -- --nocapture printed schema_valid=true deserialize=ok semantic_valid=true for all three examples.

goals_checked.goal: Verify regression tests exist so plan examples drifting invalid breaks cargo test.
evidence: crates/autocomplete-protocol/tests/plan_examples.rs is an integration test included in cargo test.

The test reads the exact reports/autocomplete-engine-mvp-plan-2026-05-28.json file at runtime, so drift in those embedded protocol examples is exercised by cargo test rather than by duplicated fixture data.
The assertions fail on generated schema invalidity, public deserialization failure, or semantic validation failure.

goals_checked.goal: Verify protocol_version remains required unless an explicit design change was documented and justified.
evidence: crates/autocomplete-protocol/src/types.rs keeps AutocompleteRequest.protocol_version as a non-optional u32 field without serde default.
crates/autocomplete-protocol/src/types.rs keeps each AutocompleteResponse variant's protocol_version as a non-optional u32 field without serde default.
crates/autocomplete-protocol/src/validation.rs calls validate_protocol_version for requests and all autocomplete response variants, requiring PROTOCOL_VERSION == 1 semantically.

crates/autocomplete-protocol/README.md documents versioned payloads include protocol_version: 1 and receivers must reject unsupported major versions. No contrary design change was found in the MVP-012 handoff or inspected protocol files.

goals_checked.goal: Verify no server/provider/client code was added in the fix task.
evidence: MVP-012 handoff lists only reports/autocomplete-engine-mvp-plan-2026-05-28.json, crates/autocomplete-protocol/tests/plan_examples.rs, and its handoff as changed files.
clients/ and packages/ directories are absent in the current workspace.

crates/autocomplete-protocol contains protocol types, validation, schema generation, and tests only. Grep hits for provider/client are protocol field names, provider-health response types, metadata/error-code names, or README text, not implementation code.
